title: AI Providers
summary: Complete reference for configuring LLM inference providers in Hermes Agent, including cloud APIs (OpenRouter, Anthropic, GitHub Copilot, Google Gemini), self-hosted endpoints (Ollama, vLLM, SGLang, llama.cpp, LM Studio), and advanced routing/fallback options.

env_vars.name: HERMES_GEMINI_PROJECT_ID
env_vars.purpose: GCP project for Google Gemini OAuth (paid/enterprise)

env_vars.name: HERMES_STREAM_READ_TIMEOUT
env_vars.purpose: Stream read timeout in seconds (for local models)

cli_commands.purpose: Full provider setup wizard (OAuth, API keys, custom endpoints)
Add a credential to a provider's pool
Switch between already-configured providers inside a session
Show remaining Google Gemini Code Assist quota

config_keys.description: Custom API base URL for the provider
Override auto-detected context window in tokens
Ordered list of fallback provider+model pairs
OpenRouter provider sort: price | throughput | latency
Minimum coding score for openrouter/pareto-code router

slash_commands.purpose: Switch provider or model inside a running session
Show Google Gemini Code Assist quota

code_examples.caption: Ollama local config
code_examples.code:
model:
  default: qwen2.5-coder:32b
  provider: custom
  base_url: http://localhost:11434/v1
  context_length: 32768

code_examples.caption: Named custom providers
code_examples.code:
custom_providers:
  - name: local
    base_url: http://localhost:8080/v1
  - name: work
    base_url: https://gpu-server.internal.corp/v1
    key_env: CORP_API_KEY

code_examples.caption: Fallback provider chain
code_examples.code:
fallback_providers:
  - provider: openrouter
    model: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4
  - provider: anthropic
    model: claude-sonnet-4

code_examples.caption: Provider routing for OpenRouter
code_examples.code:
provider_routing:
  sort: "throughput"
  ignore: ["deepinfra"]
  require_parameters: true
  data_collection: "deny"

code_examples.caption: Anthropic with API key
code_examples.code:
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=***
hermes chat --provider anthropic --model claude-sonnet-4-6

gotchas: hermes model (outside session) is for adding new providers; /model (inside session) only switches between already-configured providers
Ollama defaults to very low context length (4096 tokens if <24GB VRAM) — set OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=32768 or use OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH environment variable
llama-server requires --jinja flag for tool calling; without it tool calls appear as raw text
Google Gemini OAuth (google-gemini-cli) uses Google's policy-violating desktop credentials — account restrictions reported by some users
Anthropic OAuth via hermes model requires Claude Max plan WITH extra usage credits, not just a base Max plan
Classic GitHub PAT tokens (ghp_*) are NOT supported by Copilot API — use OAuth tokens (gho_*) or fine-grained PATs
SGLang defaults to only 128 max output tokens — set --default-max-tokens on the server
OPENAI_BASE_URL and LLM_MODEL env vars are removed — use config.yaml only
Z.AI provider auto-probes multiple endpoints; do not set GLM_BASE_URL manually
context_length controls total input window; model.max_tokens controls output length only — common confusion
full_text:
# AI Providers

This page covers setting up inference providers for Hermes Agent — from cloud APIs like OpenRouter and Anthropic, to self-hosted endpoints like Ollama and vLLM, to advanced routing and fallback configurations. You need at least one provider configured to use Hermes.
